intent: Add one additional stopCondition to strengthen TEAM-0028 synthetic collision fixture B.
patch:
diff --git a/packages/cli/src/commands/team.ts b/packages/cli/src/commands/team.ts
--- a/packages/cli/src/commands/team.ts
+++ b/packages/cli/src/commands/team.ts
@@ -809,6 +809,7 @@
       'scope must stay within declared allowed files',
       'required roles must each be uniquely represented',
       'validators must not report blocking permission conflicts',
+      'pilot fixtures should never target path-to-atom-map directly',
       'a broader or stronger lane must stop the plan'
     ],
